data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic candidate-to-request integrity.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Deterministic candidate-to-request integrity', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the satisfaction of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this integrity but does not provide evidence that it has been fulfilled, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic candidate-to-request integrity being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
